articles.title: MLB All-Star Game 2026 live updates: AL wins behind first shutout in 13 years - USA Today
articles.description: AL pitching dominated the night, with the league throwing the first All-Star Game shutout in 13 years. Miguel Vargas homered in the win.

articles.title: Spain storms into World Cup final after shutting down France - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Spain will face either defending champion Argentina or England in Sunday's World Cup final.

articles.title: X-rays negative after AL 3B Junior Caminero hit by pitch - ESPN
articles.description: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game, Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker. Though the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse, X-rays came back negative.

articles.title: LeBron James reportedly shifts ‘focus' to three teams in NBA free agency - NBC Sports Bay Area & California
articles.description: LeBron James' NBA free agency decision is coming, and his focus reportedly has narrowed to three teams, with the Golden State Warriors on the outside.

articles.title: This 17-year-old from Lower Merion was booed during the Home Run Derby. He called it ‘an honor.’ - Inquirer.com
articles.description: Reed Weiner couldn’t come up with a running catch in the outfield on a ball hit in the Derby and heard about it from the crowd. It was all good, he said. He does the same when he’s a fan.

articles.title: Latest On NBA’s Investigation Into Clippers, Kawhi Leonard - Hoops Rumors

articles.description: USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese said he felt hurt by the backlash following the elimination from the 2026 World Cup after losing 4-1 to Belgium in the round of 16.

articles.description: Texans co-founder and senior chair Janice S. McNair died Tuesday in Houston at age 89, the team said.
